calendar.matters:
Trust Beneficiary M. Nightingale'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Order On The Basis Of Extrinsic Mistakes; Etc.
Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Text Ruling

Petition For Termination Of Trust And Termination Of Trust Beneficiary'S Possession Of Trust
Off Calendar Jun-07-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gordon Yamamoto for and with Anita Limbird. (Petitioner).

Mr. Yamamoto presented a copy of cancelled check #1653. The Court granted the Petition for Termination of Trust with the exception of an eviction/possession order (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Petition For Termination Of Trust And Termination Of Trust Beneficiary'S Possession Of Trust
Off Calendar Apr-25-2011 Continued To May-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gordon Yamamoto for and with Anita Limbird.

The Court noted that Michael Nightengale was not present, raised the issue of notice and stated that it wants to see that Mr. Nightengale has 30 days notice and personal service. Mr. Yamamoto stated that he has copies of cancelled checks and that he was in a position to put them together if required by the Probate Examiner. The matter was continued to May 23, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that what is to be filed should be filed by the end of this week and that copies are to be provided to Mr. Nightengale.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
